text:
{"folios":[{"folio":"","text":"Nuͤn fant ieg buͤffoff Joͤrich
Ouͤ zoͤnft man vnd St gallen
fant hymn Joͤrich Soͤ were H
but Haitub Goupt Sioͤ Idge
fant Joͤnft Junger ember awzatt fůt
Getwase ein Burg Noͤ greory
hoͤfter Goupt 1f amit bleͤijsy
fant Joͤnftmaͤ wery 1f fant andwerB oney
Vnd fant laſſmb awylet will
tot fowan Joͤbe 3weren zen gde Soͤ fant eypols
wic my finſt Miſy Wirtellarte Wurdent 1ſf
Henteil blanſt moͤff onmentag Nor fant Joſaphb
worf ant Noͤ trwilt die blůt ge Bůngſteͤy fůrcy awir
otyͤ vnd Gallb
Kod goͤng fůng were vaͤr leit mutwilt fůr die huͤſegebi
and vnd Sioͤrey Soͤ fant zů Landſtatte
wonzey Veld Huͤſe fůt Soͤ wſprete fidoͤ die
renſt tring giflut all gemeynſt ding
fůr die Spital vnd fůr all bilgeren awir
anͤ Steͤn Reine
Gawſitte Elayſen","addition1":"","addition2":"","addition3":""}]}

folios.text:
Nuͤn fant ieg buͤffoff Joͤrich
Ouͤ zoͤnft man vnd St gallen
fant hymn Joͤrich Soͤ were H
but Haitub Goupt Sioͤ Idge
fant Joͤnft Junger ember awzatt fůt
Getwase ein Burg Noͤ greory
hoͤfter Goupt 1f amit bleͤijsy
fant Joͤnftmaͤ wery 1f fant andwerB oney
Vnd fant laſſmb awylet will
tot fowan Joͤbe 3weren zen gde Soͤ fant eypols
wic my finſt Miſy Wirtellarte Wurdent 1ſf
Henteil blanſt moͤff onmentag Nor fant Joſaphb
worf ant Noͤ trwilt die blůt ge Bůngſteͤy fůrcy awir
otyͤ vnd Gallb
Kod goͤng fůng were vaͤr leit mutwilt fůr die huͤſegebi
and vnd Sioͤrey Soͤ fant zů Landſtatte
wonzey Veld Huͤſe fůt Soͤ wſprete fidoͤ die
renſt tring giflut all gemeynſt ding
fůr die Spital vnd fůr all bilgeren awir
anͤ Steͤn Reine
Gawſitte Elayſen
